metadata.name: provenn_protocol
metadata.description: Provenn — unfakeable AI trading agent track records on Solana

instructions.name: commit
docs: Commit to a prediction for a match, before the fact.
Stores only `prediction_hash = sha256(prediction_bytes || nonce)` plus
the chain's own slot and unix timestamp. The prediction itself stays
secret until reveal, so committing leaks no alpha — but the timestamp
proves the call was made in advance.
Trust model: the commit PDA (seeds: `["commit", agent, match_id]`)
allows exactly one commit per agent per match; there is no way to
commit twice and later keep only the winner. **Unrevealed commits
score as losses — silence is penalized.**

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register a new agent.
Creates the agent's identity PDA (seeds: `["agent", authority]`) and
binds it to a `strategy_hash` — a hash of the agent's strategy
description/code, committed up front so the operator cannot quietly
swap strategies while keeping the track record.
Trust model: one agent account per authority keypair. The track record
lives on this PDA and is only ever written by protocol instructions —
never directly by the operator.

instructions.name: reveal
docs: Reveal a previously committed prediction.
Verifies `sha256(prediction_bytes || nonce)` against the stored
`prediction_hash` (prediction_bytes = Borsh serialization of
`Prediction`). Must happen BEFORE `settle` for this commit; a reveal
after settlement is rejected because the unrevealed commit has already
been scored as a loss.
Trust model: the hash check makes it impossible to reveal anything
other than what was committed. **Unrevealed commits score as losses —
silence is penalized**, so a rational agent always reveals, win or
lose.

instructions.name: settle
docs: Settle a commit against the actual match outcome and accumulate the
agent's Brier score.
TODO(oracle): currently gated on the hardcoded `SETTLE_AUTHORITY`
admin signer. Replace with on-chain verification of a TxLINE
validation proof (signed result attestation from the feed) so results
need no trusted admin.
## Scoring (basis points, lower is better)
We collapse the 3-way market to a two-outcome Brier score on the
PREDICTED outcome: the agent stakes probability `p` (confidence_bps)
on its pick, and implicitly `1 - p` on "not my pick". This is a
deliberate simplification of the full multi-category Brier score —
the agent does not publish a full distribution over home/draw/away,
only its pick and confidence, so we score exactly what was committed:
- revealed and correct:  `brier_bps = (10000 - p)^2 / 10000`
- revealed and wrong:    `brier_bps = p^2 / 10000`
- unrevealed:            `brier_bps = 10000` (maximally wrong)
**Unrevealed commits score as losses — silence is penalized.** This is
the core mechanism that makes the track record unfakeable: you cannot
bury your bad calls, and a maximally-confident wrong call costs as
much as never showing up.

accounts.name: settle_authority
docs: TODO(oracle): replace admin signer with TxLINE validation-proof check.

instructions.name: settle_with_proof
docs: Trustless settlement: score a commit against a match result proven by
TxODDS's on-chain data oracle, with no admin signer.
The caller supplies the TxODDS score-validation `payload` (record +
Merkle proof, from `/api/scores/stat-validation`) with exactly two
stats — full-time home goals at index 0, away goals at index 1. This
program then:
1. binds the proof to this match (`fixture_id == match_id`) and checks
the two stat keys/period are the pinned goal stats,
2. builds — itself — the predicate strategy that is true iff
`actual_outcome` holds (`home - away >/</== 0`),
3. CPIs `validate_stat_v2` on the TxODDS oracle, which recomputes the
Merkle root from the proof, compares it to its own anchored daily
root PDA, and evaluates the predicate,
4. requires the returned bool is `true`, then applies the same Brier
scoring as `settle`.
Because the strategy is built here and the stats are proven against
TxODDS's root, neither the caller nor any admin can assert a false
result: a wrong `actual_outcome` makes the predicate false and aborts.

accounts.name: daily_scores_roots
docs: oracle program here, and the oracle re-derives/validates its own PDA
seeds inside the CPI. Passed read-only.

accounts.name: txoracle_program
docs: `TXORACLE_PROGRAM_ID` before the CPI.

errors.name: HashMismatch
errors.msg: Revealed prediction does not match the committed hash

errors.name: RevealAfterSettle
errors.msg: Cannot reveal after settlement — unrevealed commits are scored as losses

errors.name: NotAuthority
errors.msg: Signer is not the required authority

errors.name: CommitAgentMismatch
errors.msg: Commit does not belong to this agent

errors.name: InvalidConfidence
errors.msg: Confidence must be between 0 and 10000 basis points

errors.name: WrongOracleProgram
errors.msg: Oracle program account is not the TxODDS txoracle program

errors.name: WrongOracleRoot
errors.msg: Daily-scores root account is not owned by the TxODDS oracle

errors.name: ProofMatchMismatch
errors.msg: Proof fixture id does not match this commit's match id

errors.name: ProofStatShape
errors.msg: Proof must carry exactly the two full-time goal stats (home, away)

errors.name: OracleNoReturn
errors.msg: TxODDS oracle returned no data from validate_stat_v2

errors.name: OutcomeNotProven
errors.msg: TxODDS oracle did not prove the asserted outcome

types.name: AgentAccount
docs: An agent's on-chain identity and cumulative track record.

fields.name: authority
docs: Keypair allowed to commit/reveal on behalf of this agent.

fields.name: name
docs: Display name.

fields.name: strategy_hash
docs: Hash of the agent's strategy, committed at registration.

fields.name: total_commits
docs: Total commits ever made (revealed or not).

fields.name: revealed_count
docs: How many of those were revealed. `total - revealed` were auto-losses.

fields.name: cumulative_brier_bps
docs: Sum of settled brier_bps. Mean Brier = cumulative / settled commits.

types.name: CommitAccount
docs: One prediction commit for one match by one agent.

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent PDA this commit belongs to.

fields.name: match_id
docs: Match identifier (maps to the TxLINE match id off-chain).

fields.name: prediction_hash
docs: sha256(borsh(Prediction) || nonce), committed before the match.

fields.name: slot
docs: Slot at commit time — chain-attested "when".

fields.name: unix_timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp at commit time.

fields.name: revealed
docs: Whether the prediction was revealed. Unrevealed at settle = auto-loss.

fields.name: settled
docs: Whether this commit has been settled (scored).

fields.name: prediction
docs: The revealed prediction (zeroed until reveal).

fields.name: brier_bps
docs: The Brier loss assigned at settlement, in basis points.

types.name: Prediction
docs: A revealed prediction: which outcome, and with what confidence.

fields.name: outcome
docs: 0 = home win, 1 = draw, 2 = away win.

fields.name: confidence_bps
docs: Confidence in the pick as basis points of probability (0..=10000).

types.name: StatValidationInput
docs: Args #1 to `validate_stat_v2`. The caller assembles this from the TxLINE
`/api/scores/stat-validation` response.
